avoid: never name a real person (roles only)
never put words in a family member's mouth
visual: no family members/children in frame
delivery-only: no dine-in/restaurant/cart scenes — the food arrives
no gym/workout framing (this is a food brand)

red-line: We are a very culturally sensitive brand and we don’t want any issues or taking side things emotion and new culture commenty and normal Saudi people the aavrage
positioning: Elevating traditional Saudi cuisine with exceptional packaging, taste, and quality.
angles_to_pursue: Highlight the convenience and quality of home delivery, emphasizing the ease of enjoying traditional dishes at home.
Share behind-the-scenes glimpses of the meticulous packaging process, focusing on maintaining freshness and quality.
Feature customer testimonials and reviews that praise the taste and quality of the dishes, using text overlays on images of the food.
Create content around the cultural significance and heritage of each dish, focusing on ingredients and preparation methods.
Develop content that showcases the versatility of dishes, such as pairing suggestions or meal ideas for different occasions.
research_requests: Investigate customer preferences regarding packaging and presentation to enhance the unboxing experience.
Explore potential partnerships with local delivery services to improve delivery speed and reliability.
Conduct a detailed analysis of competitor positioning in the traditional Saudi food market to identify unique opportunities.
